summary: Simplified camera workflow testing complete. All 13 requested features verified working correctly. New CameraModal uses ONLY <input type='file'> elements (no getUserMedia). Camera input has capture='environment', gallery input has no capture attribute. Clean empty state with 'Photographier le colis' text, big blue 'Prendre une photo' button, and 'Choisir depuis la galerie' button. NO 'Caméra indisponible' error message appears.
passed_tests: Driver dashboard displays correctly with stats (1 En cours, 5 Livrées, 85 Éco-score) - PASS
Delivery cards display properly with tracking ID, recipient name, address - PASS
Photo button appears on in-transit delivery card - PASS
Clicking Photo opens simplified camera modal (data-testid='camera-modal') - PASS
Camera modal shows header with tracking ID (TP-F4C4E604) and 'Photo du colis' title - PASS
Camera modal shows 'Photographier le colis' empty state with camera icon - PASS
Camera modal has 'Prendre une photo' button (data-testid='take-photo-btn') - PASS
Camera modal has 'Choisir depuis la galerie' button (data-testid='gallery-btn') - PASS
Hidden camera input exists with capture='environment' and accept='image/*' (data-testid='camera-file-input') - PASS
Hidden gallery input exists with accept='image/*' and NO capture attribute (data-testid='gallery-file-input') - PASS
NO getUserMedia errors or 'Caméra indisponible' message appears (old camera stream logic removed) - PASS
Admin login regression test (admin@transporter-pro.com / admin123) - PASS
Admin dashboard loads correctly with all navigation tabs - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: CameraModal (lines 534-683): Correctly implements simplified file input approach - no getUserMedia
Camera input has capture='environment' attribute for mobile camera access
Gallery input has NO capture attribute (correct for gallery selection)
processImage function properly resizes images to max 1280px dimension
handleConfirm triggers AI analysis after photo confirmation
handleReset clears photo state and input values for retake
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simplified camera workflow verified in iteration 13. CameraModal component (lines 534-683 in DriverDashboard.jsx) now uses ONLY <input type='file'> elements: 1) camera-file-input with capture='environment' for camera, 2) gallery-file-input without capture for gallery. NO getUserMedia code. Clean empty state shows 'Photographier le colis' with camera icon. Two buttons: 'Prendre une photo' (blue, primary) and 'Choisir depuis la galerie' (outline). After photo selection, preview shows with 'Confirmer la photo' button. All data-testid attributes present and working.

simplified_camera_workflow.requirement_1: Remove getUserMedia entirely - VERIFIED (no getUserMedia code in CameraModal)
simplified_camera_workflow.requirement_2: Use ONLY <input type='file' accept='image/*' capture='environment' /> - VERIFIED (camera-file-input)
simplified_camera_workflow.requirement_3: Show photo preview immediately after selection - VERIFIED (previewUrl state, photo-preview element)
simplified_camera_workflow.requirement_4: Big blue 'Confirmer la photo' button to validate - VERIFIED (confirm-photo-btn)
simplified_camera_workflow.requirement_5: On confirm → run AI analysis → close modal and show results - VERIFIED (handleConfirm function)

ui_elements_verified.gallery-btn: Outline button 'Choisir depuis la galerie' - PASS
